title: tephrosia purpurea
intro: Tephrosia purpurea, also known as Heartleaf, is a perennial legume native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia purpurea include treating fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Tephrosia purpurea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
